channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti needs cleaning, 2nd May
item.description:
Please clean the graffiti on the garage at the rear of the high street, next to No.1 Moorfield.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, High Street, Goddington, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish on pavement, 2nd May
item.description:
Lots of household and commercial rubbish on the side of the street and pavement - more added often

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waylett Place, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light to bright, 2nd May
item.description:
The street light outside my property is very very bright. I would like to have one of the cover put up to avoid it shining into my bedroom as this is keeping me awake.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, The Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pond street meets South End Street, 2nd May
item.description:
Over the past 2 years of driving and living in the area daily, I observe that too many cars don't yield and cross the South End Road, which creates danger to motorists on South End Road and Fleet Road. The sign painte on the road doesn't deter them from crossing, it's not explicit enough. Can there please be a proper Yield sign installed on the corner so that cars yield more often?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Pond Street, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 2nd May
item.description:
Dead Fox Woolwich poly playing field
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pitfield Crescent, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd May
item.description:
Sanford Street by Sterling Gardens Remove graffiti from stop L

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sanford Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Pothole meets criteria for repair, 2nd May
item.description:
Further to your rejection of cases 9204225 and 9318903. I attach a photo that shows yhe pothole is greater than 31mm The edges of the potholes are less so but the centre is considersble over 31mm. This is the case for all the potholes on the edge. Your team should send me photos on anamosaic@gmail.com proving these potholes ate less than 31mm as you probably have better kit Please add to your works schedule.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Priestlands Park Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd May
item.description:
Trundleys Road opposite Folkestone Garden Remove graffiti from bus shelter at stop c

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trundley's Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frankswood Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti needs cleaning Telecoms Box Franks Wood Av, near junction with Crescent Drive, 2nd May
item.description:
Please clean the graffiti, Telecoms Box Franks Wood Av, near junction with Crescent Drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frankswood Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 41 Nassington Road, 2nd May
item.description:
The parking sign is missing (CA-H standard resident parking sign). The sign was unscrewed by thieves to steal someone's bicycle. See the original sign on the map here: https://www.google.co.uk/maps/place/Rona+Rd,+London+NW3+2HY/@51.5565843,-0.1604531,3a,75y,43.28h,79.21t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sP9wpxoyrPgWXgzEN-W1j-w!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D10.790596691049998%26panoid%3DP9wpxoyrPgWXgzEN-W1j-w%26yaw%3D43.282514710169096!7i16384!8i8192!4m6!3m5!1s0x48761af799986137:0xb96b27b5e351bc04!8m2!3d51.5549652!4d-0.1542039!16s%2Fg%2F1w97twnm?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDQyOS4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Nassington Road, Gospel Oak, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mount of Rubble in Road, 2nd May
item.description:
Where the pothole has been repaired the contracts have dumped the rubble on the road, it's at least 1m wide and quite high and in the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags flytipped, 2nd May
item.description:
Black bags flytipped on the pavement in Hogarth Court outside 5 Fountain Drive SE19 1UW

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hogarth Court, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Beside cycle shelter on samos, 2nd May
item.description:
The wooden planter that is beside the cycle locker on samos road is disintegrating and has seen better days. no one appears to take an interest in the planter so could it be removed or replaced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd May
item.description:
Between hours of 8:30am and 3pm today (2/5/26) someone (we think a tradesman) came and dumped a load of rubble, paints, tools, wood etc down our right of way, on my part of the land.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 227, Southborough Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-bike abandoned on pavement, 2nd May
item.description:
E-bike abandoned in the middle of the pavement creating a potential hazard for pedestrians especially the blind and partially-sighted, but also disabled and vulnerable people.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish tipped onto bicycle locker, 2nd May
item.description:
Appeared today, very messy.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath

item.title: Large pothole, 2nd May
